'''Crawlfish''' were edible aquatic creatures native to [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]'s many spring-fed pools.

==Biology and Appearance==
Crawlfish were harmless, red-colored crustaceans that could grow up to a meter and a half in length and were covered in [[Chitin/Legends|chitin]]. They have no real defenses against predators beyond their slipperiness.<ref name="GG2-1" />

==Mating and Spawning==
At the beginning of Yavin 4's wet season, male crawlfish leave their pools and start a long hunt through the underbrush in search of a mate. Female crawlfish, meanwhile, build nests of bubbles and twigs in their own pools under the shelter of overhanging branches. Females typically have the choice of among half a dozen potential mates, with rejected males forced to walk from pool to pool until they find a new mate or eventually starve. The female crawlfish will mark her chosen mate by bubbling against his forehead before mating. After spawning, the attentive parents will take turns fetching new twigs and rebuilding any torn bubbles in their nest until the eggs hatch. After one season, juvenile crawlfish will leave their birth pool and seek empty or less crowded pools to inhabit.<ref name="GG2-1">''[[Galaxy Guide 2: Yavin and Bespin]]''</ref>

==Habitat==
Crawlfish inhabit the many deep, spring-fed pools scattered across the jungles of Yavin 4.<ref name="GG2-1" />

==Diet==
Crawlfish feed on the myriad of insects and amphibians that live on Yavin 4.<ref name="GG2-1" />

==Use by Other Species==
Crawlfish are considered relatively easy to catch and can provide a good meal. For those lost and in search of water, a crawlfish will eventually lead one to a spring-fed pool.<ref name="GG2-1" />

{{Species-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Crawlfish appeared in the video game Star Wars Galaxies, a massively multiplayer online roleplaying game developed by [[Sony]] and published by LucasArts, prior to its closure on [[December 15]], 2011.
